case_title: NOLA MARKETING, LLC VS. CLIFF KAPLAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-18-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN, CLIFF
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (MOTION TO VACATE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOLA MARKETING, LLC (EMILY MATTHEWS, PRINCIPAL)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CLIFF KAPLAN SET FOR MAR-26-2010 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-14-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD "LATERAL DESIGNS INC. DBA DESIGN BACK OFFICE" AS A DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM WITH THE COURT, AND SERVE THE AMENDED CLAIM OF DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO ACCEPT SERVICE BY PERSONAL DELIVERY OR TRACKABLE MAIL DELIVERY TO ITS STEVENSON STREET OFFICES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. (BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TO REMAIN IN THE COURT FILE FOR THE NEXT COURT HEARING)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOLA MARKETING, LLC (EMILY MATTHEWS, PRINCIPAL)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOLA MARKETING, LLC (EMILY MATTHEWS, PRINCIPAL)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JUL-01-2010
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NOLA MARKETING, LLC (EMILY MATTHEWS, PRINCIPAL) AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN, CLIFF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-23-2009 BY JEFFREY S. ROSS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOLA MARKETING, LLC (EMILY MATTHEWS, PRINCIPAL) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAPLAN, CLIFF $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $166.00 INTEREST, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,276.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KAPLAN, CLIFF HEARING SET FOR FEB-19-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-23-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CLIFF KAPLAN SET FOR FEB-19-2010 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-26-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN 506.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED, BY DEFT'S ATTY.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CLIFF KAPLAN IS GRANTED. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - SETTLED BY DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
